reviewer_sources.query: Go to https://www.rtings.com/headphones/reviews/best/wireless-earbuds and extract every wireless earbud they recommend. For each product get: full product name, their award or ranking, overall score, sound score, ANC score, battery life, price, pros with specific test data, cons.

Go to https://soundguys.com/best-earbuds-2623/ and extract every wireless earbud they recommend. For each product get: full product name, their award or category, rating, price, battery life, codec support, pros with specific measurements, cons.

Go to https://www.theverge.com/21309820/best-wireless-earbuds and extract every wireless earbud they recommend. For each product get: full product name, their award or category, price, battery life, ANC quality, sound quality notes, pros with specifics, cons.

Go to https://www.cnet.com/tech/mobile/best-wireless-earbuds/ and extract every wireless earbud they recommend. For each product get: full product name, their award or category, rating, price, battery life, ANC score, sound quality notes, pros with specific test results, cons.

Go to https://www.techgearlab.com/topics/audio/best-earbuds and extract every wireless earbud they recommend. For each product get: full product name, their ranking and overall score, price, sound quality score, ANC score, battery life, comfort notes, pros with specifics, cons.
